grammarInScope: Preterito indefinido (regulares + irregulares frecuentes: fui, hice, tuve, estuve, pude)
Contraste perfecto/indefinido (regional variation: perfecto more frequent in peninsular Spanish)
Pronombres de OD (lo, la, los, las)
Conectores basicos (porque, pero, y, o, tambien, ademas, sin embargo)
Marcadores temporales (ayer, la semana pasada, hace + tiempo, desde hace)
Ir a + infinitivo para planes e intenciones
grammarOutOfScope: Preterito imperfecto (introduced end of A2.2 but contrast with indefinido is B1)
Conectores complejos (no obstante como marcador de parrafo)

inappropriateExerciseTypes.reason: Error correction introduced at B1; A2 student lacks sufficient system knowledge to detect errors reliably
Register and intent identification too abstract
Sustained monologue (2+ min): insufficient linguistic resources to sustain it
Debate requires argumentation the A2 student does not yet have

instructionLanguage: Mostly in L2, with L1 clarifications when the task type is new
metalanguageLevel: Basic metalanguage in L2: pasado, presente, verbo, adjetivo
errorCorrection: Immediate for systemic errors at risk of fossilization. Deferred for performance errors. Begin encouraging self-correction: '?Estas seguro? Piensa otra vez.'

guidedWriting.structures: simple sentences, basic connectors (and, but, because)
guidedWriting.complexity: Concrete everyday situations, two or three tasks.
guidedWriting.situationGuidance: Personal topics (daily life, preferences, simple events)
